title: Q5 Polymerase PCR Cloning
author: NUS iGEM
license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.7pqhmmw

steps.instruction: Prepare 6-reaction PCR mix by adding together 244.2 µL deionized water, 66 µL Q5 reaction buffer, 6.6 µL dNTP mix, and 3.3 µL Q5 DNA polymerase Water refers to sterilized deionized water Contributed by users Q5 Reaction Buffer Pack - 6.0 ml New England Biolabs Catalog #B9027S dNTP Mix, PCR Grade (200 µl) Qiagen Catalog #201900 Q5 High-Fidelity DNA Polymerase - 100 units New England Biolabs Catalog #M0491S

steps.instruction: Add 1 µL 1 of template DNA and 0.5 µL of primer pairs into specified PCR tube
Aliquot 48 µL of PCR mix into each PCR tube

Load PCR tubes in thermocycler Protocol is set to run at 98 °C for 00:00:40 followed by 00:00:30 for the desired annealing temperature before 72 °C for x amount of time (depending on fragment length). The cycle repeats for 34 rounds starting with 00:00:10 at 98 °C followed by annealing and elongation, before incubating at 72 °C for 00:05:00 and then 4 °C infinitely. In this PCR run, the elongation time and annealing temperature depends on specific fragment length and primer annealing temperature.
